mapper.insert: INSERT INTO action_log(target_type, target_id, admin_id, action_type, reason) VALUES(#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{reason})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM action_log a JOIN user u ON a.admin_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN workshop w ON a.target_id = w.workshop_id AND a.target_type = 'WORKSHOP' LEFT JOIN program p ON a.target_id = p.program_id AND a.target_type = 'PROGRAM' LEFT JOIN workshop ws ON p.workshop_id = ws.workshop_id AND a.target_type = 'PROGRAM'
a.target_type IN ('WORKSHOP', 'PROGRAM')
a.target_type = 'WORKSHOP'
a.target_type = 'PROGRAM'
AND a.action_type = #{filter}
AND (w.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
